series_metadata.series_title: Quarterly Side Schedule & Back Up Info
series_metadata.series_description: Quarterly schedules not contained on administrative forms. Used to compute federal reports and reconiliation forms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 2 years, records center 3 years, or until audited by the federal auditors is completed and realeased, the destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 2 years, records center 3 years, or until audited by the federal auditors is completed and released, the destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
